task.title: UE5 Python API 查询辅助 —— 问一个具体 API 返回结构化答案
task.description: 用户问一个 UE5 API 问题（如何导入静态网格、某某类的签名），ue5_api_assist 别名路由到 Sonnet 给结构化答复。

input_payload.prompt: In Unreal Engine 5 Python, what is the exact AssetImportTask API signature used to import an FBX static mesh? Include the class name, the factory options class, and the key boolean properties on both.

config.task_goal: Produce a structured answer about the requested UE5 Python API. Cite the exact class name, constructor, and listed properties in the schema fields.
